calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-09-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Tim Watson for Sean Munoz (Petitioner/Executor).

Mr. Watson stated that he agreed with the examiners notes and that Thomas share was 1/3. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Lee.

Petition For Removal And Suspension Of Powers Of Co-Executor Gregory S. Holloway
Off Calendar Mar-08-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Paul Newman appearing for petitioner. Tim Watson appearing for and with Sean Munoz. Mr. Newman has mailed notice to Gregory in Colorado. Gregory has not responded. Matter granted. Order signed. Court asked Mr. Munoz to do his best to get in touch with Gregory. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

Petition For Removal And Suspension Of Powers Of Co-Executor Gregory S. Holloway
Off Calendar Feb-15-2006 Continued To Mar-08-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Paul Newman appearing for petitioner. Court sees a conflict for counsel to continue to represent the co-executors. Counsel to notify the co-executors to get new counsel. Matter is continued to 3/8. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
